title: What areas does Soma General Traders operate in?
description:
What areas does Soma General Traders operate in?
                                  
                                      
                                  
                              
                              
                                  
                                      Soma General Traders operates nationwide across Tanzania and throughout the Eastern Africa region, including Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi, Zambia, Mozambique, Malawi, Zimbabwe, and South Africa. We support cross-border trade and regional operations with full regulatory compliance across all corridors.
                                  
                              
                          

                          
                              
                                  What types of clients do you serve?
                                  
                                      
                                  
                              
                              
                                  
                                      We serve a wide range of clients including corporates, government entities, NGOs, institutions, and private businesses. Our solutions are designed to support procurement, supply, movement, and management of goods and services for organizations of all sizes across various industries.
                                  
                              
                          

                          
                              
                                  How does your clearing and freight forwarding service work?
                                  
                                      
                                  
                              
                              
                                  
                                      Our clearing and freight forwarding service covers the full process — from initial documentation and customs declaration to physical cargo release and onward deli
